loan_type.text: ประเภทหนี้

root.sql: SELECT sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no, sc_mem_m_ucf_prename.prename, sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_name, sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_surname, sc_mem_m_membership_registered.sex, sc_mem_m_ucf_member_type.mem_type_desc, trim( pkb_kromss.fp_get_address_letter( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no , sc_mem_m_membership_registered.doc_place_status , 1 ) ) || ' ' || trim( pkb_kromss.fp_get_address_letter( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no , sc_mem_m_membership_registered.doc_place_status , 2 ) ) || ' ' || trim( pkb_kromss.fp_get_address_letter( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no , sc_mem_m_membership_registered.doc_place_status , 3 ) ) as mem_address, sc_mem_m_ucf_district.district_name, sc_mem_m_ucf_province.province_name, sc_mem_m_member_address.postcode, sc_mem_m_member_address.telephone, ' ' as c_fax, sc_mem_m_membership_registered.id_card, sc_mem_m_ucf_member_status.member_status_name, sc_lon_m_contract.loan_type, sc_lon_m_contract.loan_approve_amount, sc_lon_m_contract.begining_of_contract, sc_lon_m_contract.loan_installment_amount, sc_lon_m_contract.appove_officer, sc_lon_m_contract.approve_date, sc_lon_m_loan_card.last_access_date, sc_lon_m_loan_card.principal_balance FROM sc_mem_m_membership_registered, sc_mem_m_ucf_prename, sc_mem_m_ucf_member_type, sc_mem_m_member_address, sc_mem_m_ucf_district, sc_mem_m_ucf_province, sc_mem_m_ucf_member_status, sc_lon_m_contract, sc_lon_m_loan_request, sc_lon_m_loan_card WHERE ( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.prename_code = sc_mem_m_ucf_prename.prename_code ) and ( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.mem_type = sc_mem_m_ucf_member_type.mem_type_code ) and ( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no = sc_mem_m_member_address.membership_no ) and ( sc_mem_m_member_address.district_code = sc_mem_m_ucf_district.district_code ) and ( sc_mem_m_member_address.province_code = sc_mem_m_ucf_district.province_code ) and ( sc_mem_m_ucf_province.province_code = sc_mem_m_ucf_district.province_code ) and ( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_status_code = sc_mem_m_ucf_member_status.member_status_code ) and ( sc_lon_m_contract.membership_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no ) and ( sc_lon_m_contract.loan_requestment_no = sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_requestment_no ) and ( sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no = sc_lon_m_loan_card.loan_contract_no ) and ( sc_lon_m_loan_card.principal_balance > '0' ) AND ( ( sc_mem_m_member_address.address_type = '0' ) ) /*WHERE*/ ORDER BY sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no ASC
